title: • Weekly assignments
content:
• Weekly assignments
• Participation in class & discussions
• Optional challenges (Mastery Exam, Creative Work, etc.)
• Leveling up unlocks:
• Alternate paths for assignments
• Bonus points applied to lowest assignment grades
• Title upgrades (e.g., “The Seeker” → “The Archivist” → “The Master Scribe”)
• Special in-class privileges (like leading discussions)

🔍 Section Naming Structure

Every section title will now have two parts:
1. A Meta Title that aligns with the overarching course themes and literary evolution.
2. A Week-Specific Title that reflects the current art/literary movement, themes, and discussion topics.

Example:
📖 The Medium Shapes the Message: Literature, Technology, and the Evolution of Storytelling
💡 (Week 4: The Gothic Mind – Fear, Obsession, and Perception in the 19th Century)

This ensures every week feels distinct but also fits into the larger picture.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 2 (chunk 2/555)
